description_long: This ornate sconce features a central stem with a textured, glass-like appearance, from which six elegantly curved arms radiate outward. Each arm supports a cylindrical, translucent lampshade, likely made of frosted or smoked glass, giving the fixture a refined and luxurious look. The arms and central body are crafted to resemble hand-blown glass, with subtle undulations and a silvery metallic finish at the base. The fixture is suspended from a matching, intricately detailed stem, suggesting it is designed for ceiling mounting. The overall design is symmetrical, with each arm evenly spaced and the shades providing a soft diffusion of light. Decorative elements include the sculpted glass arms and the ribbed central column, contributing to a sophisticated, classic aesthetic.
description: A luxurious, glass-like sconce with six curved arms, each holding a cylindrical frosted glass shade, suspended from an ornate central stem. The design is elegant and symmetrical, with sculpted glass and metallic accents.
description_view_0: Front view showing all six arms and shades symmetrically arranged around the central stem, highlighting the ornate glasswork.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the curvature of the arms and the depth of the cylindrical shades, with the central stem and decorative details more visible.
description_view_2: Rear view mirroring the front, with all arms and shades visible, emphasizing the symmetry and glass texture.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the arm curvature and the layered structure of the central stem and shades.
attribute_fixture_design: The fixture exhibits a classic, vintage-inspired design with ornate, hand-blown glass arms and a ribbed central column. Its overall style is elegant and traditional, reminiscent of early 20th-century chandeliers.
